name: What if my case was referred via AI and now it's denied—can I sue the referring firm?
description: Sue for malpractice if AI referral negligence caused denial; track via tools like CloudLex.[4]

mainEntity.name: What if my case was referred via AI and now it's denied—can I sue the referring firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue for malpractice if AI referral negligence caused denial; track via tools like CloudLex.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if the AI referral was negligent (e.g., overlooked key facts), you may have a malpractice claim against the referring firm. Referral networks like CloudLex track fees but hold referrers liable for bad faith.[4] Factors: proof of inaccurate AI assessment, financial loss, state rules (CA/NY 3-year limit). Evidence includes intake forms showing AI input errors. Switch firms and document losses before suing.
